records.question: Which electronics have a service type of Check and service details exactly Satisfied on 2016-08-04 00:25:55 at location 94425 Nellie Kn, associated with Denesik and Sons Party?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_locations_of_things.location_code = '94425 Nellie Kn' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
JOIN Services s ON t.service_id = s.service_id
JOIN Organizations o ON s.organization_id = o.organization_id
JOIN Timed_Locations_of_Things tlot ON t.thing_id = tlot.thing_id
WHERE t.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'electronics'
AND s.service_type_code = 'Check'
AND s.service_details = 'Satisfied'
AND tlot.Date_and_Time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55'
AND tlot.Location_Code = '94425 Nellie Kn'
AND o.organization_details LIKE '%Denesik and Sons Party%'

records.question: Which electronics items have a service type exactly Check and service details exactly Unsatisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
WHERE things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics' AND things.service_details = 'Unsatisfied'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
WHERE t.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'electronics'
AND t.service_type_code = 'Check'
AND t.service_details = 'Unsatisfied'

records.question: Which furniture items have a service type exactly Cleanning and belong to organizations that offer Cleanning services?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Furniture' AND things.service_type_code = 'Cleanning' AND services.service_type_code = 'Cleanning'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
JOIN Organizations o ON t.organization_id = o.organization_id
JOIN Services s ON o.organization_id = s.organization_id
WHERE t.service_type_code = 'Cleanning'
AND s.service_type_code = 'Cleanning'

records.question: Which things are associated with organizations that provide services where the service_type_code is Moving Out?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE services.service_type_code = 'Moving Out'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
JOIN Organizations o ON t.organization_id = o.organization_id
JOIN Services s ON o.organization_id = s.organization_id
WHERE s.service_type_code = 'Moving Out'

records.question: Which things have service_details that are exactly Satisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
WHERE things.service_details = 'Satisfied'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
WHERE t.service_details = 'Satisfied'

records.question: Which Furniture items have service details exactly Satisfied and have had status updates on or after 2017-07-03 02:22:12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Furniture' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND timed_status_of_things.date_and_date >= '2017-07-03 02:22:12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
INNER JOIN Timed_Status_of_Things tst ON t.thing_id = tst.thing_id
WHERE t.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'Furniture'
AND t.service_details = 'Satisfied'
AND tst.Date_and_Date >= '2017-07-03 02:22:12'

records.question: Which things belong to organizations and have a type_of_thing_code exactly equal to Commen?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Commen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
WHERE t.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'Commen'
AND t.organization_id IS NOT NULL

WHERE timed_locations_of_things.location_code = '064 Charles Mou'
records.pred_sql:

FROM Things t

records.question: Which furniture items have a service type exactly Check with service details exactly Unsatisfied, and belong to the organization Denesik and Sons Party?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
WHERE things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Furniture'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
JOIN Organizations o ON t.organization_id = o.organization_id
WHERE t.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'Furniture'
AND t.service_type_code = 'Check'
AND t.service_details = 'Unsatisfied'
AND o.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'

records.question: Which electronics from Denesik and Sons Party have a service check marked as satisfied while their pay bills service is unsatisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND services.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND services.service_type_code = 'Pay bills' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
JOIN Organizations o ON t.organization_id = o.organization_id
JOIN Services s ON o.organization_id = s.organization_id
WHERE o.organization_details LIKE '%Denesik and Sons Party%'
AND t.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'electronics'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Services s1
  WHERE s1.organization_id = o.organization_id
  AND s1.service_type_code = 'service check'
  AND s1.service_id IN (
    SELECT service_id FROM Residents_Services
    WHERE date_provided IS NOT NULL
  )
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Services s2
  WHERE s2.organization_id = o.organization_id
  AND s2.service_type_code = 'pay bills'
  AND s2.service_id IN (
    SELECT service_id FROM Residents_Services
    WHERE date_provided IS NULL
  )
)
